---
title: "Contact Me"
toc: false
---

Thank you for visiting my website! 

Please feel free to reach out to me through any of the following methods:

---

#### 📧 Email  
**[bdegouw@bu.edu](mailto:bdegouw@bu.edu)**  

#### 💼 LinkedIn  
**[linkedin.com/in/bowen-de-gouw](https://www.linkedin.com/in/bowen-de-gouw)**

#### 📍 Location  
Boston, Massachusetts, USA & Auckland, New Zealand

** Relocating to Sydney, Australia in late 2026/Early 2027 to begin my Professional Career!**


---

<div style="text-align: center; font-style: italic; margin-top: 40px;">
  <strong>
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/bowen-de-gouw" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a> ·
    <a href="https://github.com/bdegouw" target="_blank">GitHub</a> ·
    <a href="mailto:bdegouw@bu.edu">Email</a>
  </strong>
</div>
